name_cn:
Genuine quality
5BC151, Miu Miu new hobo bag, made of top-grade imported calfskin, fashionable dragonfly line design, exquisite and structured body, large size for a casual and relaxed look, versatile style, high adaptability, looks good with any outfit, iconic metal logo on front, warm design with adjustable leather shoulder strap, canvas lining, dimensions 27X20X8Cm, comes with original packaging
